indications.text:
TRADENAME is indicated for the topical treatment of multiple actinic or solar keratoses of the
face and anterior scalp.

Carac is indicated for the topical treatment of multiple actinic or solar keratoses of the face and anterior
scalp.

Carac is indicated for the topical treatment of multiple actinic or solar keratoses of the face and anterior
scalp.
